items.title_en: Progressive Nithya Raman advances to November runoff against Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass
items.title_zh: 进步派 Nithya Raman 晋级 11 月决选，对手是洛杉矶市长 Karen Bass
items.desc_en: Progressive city council member Nithya Raman has advanced to a November runoff against Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass, setting up an unexpected matchup between two Democrats and former political allies
items.desc_zh: 进步市议会议员尼西亚·拉曼 (Nithya Raman) 已进入 11 月的决选，对手是洛杉矶市长凯伦·巴斯 (Karen Bass)，这为两位民主党人和前政治盟友之间带来了一场意想不到的对决

items.title_en: Democrat Secures Second L.A. Mayor Spot and Ends Spencer Pratt’s Run - The New York Times

items.title_en: Israel and Iran flare-up tests Trump's grip and could strengthen Tehran's negotiating hand
items.title_zh: 以色列和伊朗的冲突考验特朗普的控制力，并可能增强德黑兰的谈判手感
items.desc_en: The web of fractious alliances and dysfunctional ceasefires shows how destabilised the region remains.
items.desc_zh: 不稳定的联盟和功能失调的停火网络表明该地区仍然不稳定。

items.title_en: Tuesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
items.title_zh: 周二的重大股票故事：下一个交易日可能会影响市场的因素
items.desc_en: Semiconductor stocks made a comeback, lifting the S&P 500 and the Nasdaq Composite into positive territory Monday.
items.desc_zh: 周一，半导体股卷土重来，推动标准普尔 500 指数和纳斯达克综合指数上涨。

items.title_en: SpaceX's stock market blast-off could be Musk's biggest gamble yet
items.title_zh: SpaceX 的股市上涨可能是马斯克迄今为止最大的赌博
items.desc_en: SpaceX is preparing for a stock market debut that could transform the company, the wider market and Elon Musk's fortune.
items.desc_zh: SpaceX 正在为股票上市做准备，这可能会改变公司、更广泛的市场和埃隆·马斯克的财富。

items.title_en: USDA Secretary Rollins calls Texas ag chief 'unserious' amid screwworm threat
items.title_zh: 美国农业部部长罗林斯称德克萨斯州农业负责人在螺旋虫威胁中“不认真”
items.desc_en: Texas Agriculture Commissioner Sid Miller lost his bid for a fourth term in a March Republican primary, despite Trump's endorsement.
items.desc_zh: 尽管得到了特朗普的支持，但得克萨斯州农业专员西德·米勒 (Sid Miller) 在 3 月份的共和党初选中失去了第四个任期。

items.title_en: Could humanoid robots be heading for the battlefield?
items.title_zh: 人形机器人会走向战场吗？
items.desc_en: Armed forces are experimenting with humanoid robots, but battlefield deployment is some way off.
items.desc_zh: 武装部队正在试验人形机器人，但距离战场部署还有一段距离。

items.title_zh: OpenAI拟上市，与Anthropic的投资竞赛加剧

items.desc_zh: ChatGPT 背后的公司在 Anthropic 提交计划一周后也提出了同样的计划。

items.desc_en: CNBC's Jim Cramer said that he's becoming more cautious on stocks after several pillars of his bullish outlook have come under pressure.

items.desc_en: OpenAI's confidential filing lands days before SpaceX is set to go public and a week after Anthropic announced its confidential disclosure with the SEC.
items.desc_zh: OpenAI 的机密文件是在 SpaceX 上市前几天、Anthropic 向 SEC 宣布机密披露一周后提交的。

items.title_zh: 蒂姆·库克 (Tim Cook) 告别之际，苹果推出 Siri AI 改造版

items.desc_zh: 在对“裸体”应用程序的广泛审查中，这家科技巨头还推出了一系列新的儿童安全功能。

items.desc_zh: 布兰奇此前曾担任特朗普总统的刑事辩护律师。

items.desc_en: Sen. Elizabeth Warren said Nvidia’s CEO should answer questions publicly as lawmakers scrutinize AI chip sales to China and export controls.

items.title_en: Bernstein says the future of tech is quantum. These two stocks have the most upside
items.title_zh: 伯恩斯坦表示，科技的未来是量子的。这两只股票上涨空间最大
items.desc_en: While it is too early to identify the ultimate winners in quantum computing, two stocks already offer more attractive risk-reward ratios, Wall Street banks said.
items.desc_zh: 华尔街银行表示，虽然现在确定量子计算的最终赢家还为时过早，但两只股票已经提供了更具吸引力的风险回报率。

items.title_en: Judge blocks Trump's $100,000 H-1B visa fee
items.title_zh: 法官阻止特朗普支付 10 万美元的 H-1B 签证费
items.desc_en: Trump had imposed the $100,000 fee in order to restrict the program, arguing that it has undermined U.S. security through the "replacement of American workers."
items.desc_zh: 特朗普征收10万美元费用是为了限制该计划，认为该计划通过“替换美国工人”损害了美国安全。

items.title_en: Convicted FTX founder Sam Bankman-Fried files formal request for Trump pardon
items.title_zh: 被定罪的 FTX 创始人 Sam Bankman-Fried 正式请求特朗普赦免
items.desc_en: The co-founder of the now defunct FTX crypto exchange is currently serving a 25-year federal prison sentence.
items.desc_zh: 现已解散的 FTX 加密货币交易所的联合创始人目前正在联邦监狱服刑 25 年。

items.title_en: Somali referee Artan barred from entering USA
items.title_zh: 索马里裁判阿尔坦被禁止进入美国
items.desc_en: Somali referee Omar Artan, who was set to be the first from his country to officiate at the World Cup finals, is denied entry to the United States.
items.desc_zh: 索马里裁判奥马尔·阿尔坦原本是该国首位执法世界杯决赛的裁判，但被美国拒绝入境。

items.title_en: Jailed crypto founder Sam Bankman-Fried seeks Trump pardon
items.title_zh: 被监禁的加密货币创始人萨姆·班克曼·弗里德寻求特朗普赦免
items.desc_en: The former leader of crypto platform FTX, currently serving a 25-year sentence, on Monday officially applied to be pardoned.
items.desc_zh: 加密货币平台 FTX 的前领导人目前正在服刑 25 年，周一正式申请赦免。

items.title_en: Eriksen at home and 'doing well' after collapse
items.title_zh: 埃里克森在家并在崩溃后“表现良好”
items.desc_en: Christian Eriksen says he is "doing well" and is at home with his family following his collapse in Sunday's game against Ukraine.
items.desc_zh: 克里斯蒂安·埃里克森在周日对阵乌克兰的比赛中倒下后表示，他“状况良好”，目前正在家里与家人团聚。

items.title_en: Kenya's ex-chief justice arrested at protest against building on national park
items.title_zh: 肯尼亚前首席法官因抗议国家公园建设而被捕
items.desc_en: Activists allege there is a plan to build a car park on protected land belonging to a wildlife sanctuary.
items.desc_zh: 活动人士声称，计划在属于野生动物保护区的受保护土地上建造一个停车场。

items.title_en: Iran says it has halted attacks on Israel after first exchange of fire since truce
items.title_zh: 伊朗表示，在休战以来首次交火后，已停止对以色列的袭击
items.desc_en: Iran launched about 30 missiles at Israel following a strike in Lebanon, while Israel carried out two waves of air strikes in Iran.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗在袭击黎巴嫩后向以色列发射了约30枚导弹，而以色列则对伊朗进行了两波空袭。

items.title_en: Iran announces 'end of military operations' against Israel, but warns Lebanon strikes could trigger escalation
items.title_zh: 伊朗宣布“结束针对以色列的军事行动”，但警告黎巴嫩袭击可能引发升级
items.desc_en: Iran and Israel traded strikes on Sunday night for the first time since a ceasefire was agreed in April, threatening to torpedo an already-fragile ceasefire.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗和以色列周日晚间进行了自四月份达成停火协议以来的首次交锋，威胁要破坏本已脆弱的停火协议。

items.title_en: Retirees fear running out of money. Many are spending too little instead
items.title_zh: 退休人员担心钱花光。相反，许多人花费太少
items.desc_en: Retirees often focus on the risk of spending too much in retirement. But spending too little poses another kind of danger.
items.desc_zh: 退休人员经常关注退休后过度消费的风险。但支出太少会带来另一种危险。

items.title_en: China is helping to cushion global oil prices below $100 — but analysts warn it won’t last
items.title_zh: 中国正在帮助将全球油价缓冲到100美元以下——但分析师警告称这种情况不会持续太久
items.desc_en: China has reduced oil imports since the start of the Iran war, capping global crude prices.
items.desc_zh: 自伊朗战争爆发以来，中国减少了石油进口，限制了全球原油价格。

items.title_en: Starmer tells Apple and Google to ban nude images on children's phones
items.title_zh: 斯塔默告诉苹果和谷歌禁止儿童手机上出现裸照
items.desc_en: Firms will be expected to activate built-in features to stop children accessing sexually explicit images.
items.desc_zh: 公司将被期望激活内置功能来阻止儿童访问露骨的色情图片。

items.title_en: Musk Joins Trump In Boosting Unsubstantiated Claims About LA Mayor Election As Pratt Drops To Third - Forbes
items.title_zh: 普拉特跌至第三位，马斯克与特朗普一起助长有关洛杉矶市长选举的未经证实的说法 - 福布斯
items.desc_en: Musk Joins Trump In Boosting Unsubstantiated Claims About LA Mayor Election As Pratt Drops To Third  ForbesHow a misreading of data fueled false claims about L.A. mayoral vote count  Los Angeles Times
items.desc_zh: 随着普拉特跌至福布斯第三位，马斯克与特朗普一起推动有关洛杉矶市长选举的未经证实的说法对数据的误读如何助长了有关洛杉矶市长选票计数的虚假说法《洛杉矶时报》

items.title_en: Trump to cheer on Knicks at NBA Finals game in New York City
items.title_zh: 特朗普将在纽约市为尼克斯队加油
items.desc_en: The Knicks' stunning winning streak has energised the city as the New York basketball team prepares for the third game of the finals series at its home arena.
items.desc_zh: 当纽约篮球队在主场为总决赛系列赛的第三场比赛做准备时，尼克斯队惊人的连胜给这座城市注入了活力。

items.title_en: Malawians repatriated from South Africa amid xenophobia concerns
items.title_zh: 出于仇外心理，马拉维人从南非被遣返
items.desc_en: Malawi is among several African nations transporting their citizens out of the country following reports of violence against migrants.
items.desc_zh: 马拉维是在发生针对移民的暴力事件的报道后将其公民运出该国的几个非洲国家之一。

items.title_en: Peru election result close as vote counting continues
items.title_zh: 秘鲁选举结果结束，计票仍在继续
items.desc_en: The race between right-wing Keiko Fujimori and left-wing Roberto Sánchez has been dominated by concerns over crime and political instability.
items.desc_zh: 右翼藤森惠子和左翼罗伯托·桑切斯之间的竞争主要是对犯罪和政治不稳定的担忧。

items.title_en: Armenia's pro-West government wins election despite Russian pressure
items.title_zh: 亚美尼亚亲西方政府不顾俄罗斯压力赢得选举
items.desc_en: Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan's Civil Contract Party secures nearly 50% of the vote, comfortably beating the other contenders.
items.desc_zh: 总理尼科尔·帕希尼扬 (Nikol Pashinyan) 领导的民事合同党 (Civil Contract Party) 获得了近 50% 的选票，轻松击败了其他竞争者。

items.title_en: At least 19 dead after major earthquake strikes southern Philippines
items.title_zh: 菲律宾南部发生大地震 至少19人死亡
items.desc_en: The magnitude-7.8 quake triggered small tsunami waves in the Philippines, Indonesia and Japan.
items.desc_zh: 7.8级地震在菲律宾、印度尼西亚和日本引发了小规模海啸。

items.title_en: Oil prices edge higher after strikes on Israel test ceasefire
items.title_zh: 以色列空袭测试停火后油价小幅上涨
items.desc_en: Iran said the attacks, its first since an April ceasefire, are the start of "a full week" of strikes
items.desc_zh: 伊朗表示，这是自四月份停火以来的首次袭击，也是“整整一周”袭击的开始

items.desc_zh: 美国总统周五表示，他预计下周将与顶级人工智能公司的领导人会面。

items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，预计 2026 年上半年调整后收益至少为 3800 万美元（2820 万英镑）。
